title: Hash Tables, Dictionaries, Sets, and Collision Policy · Independent Algorithm Trial
summary: Create a deduplication and lookup service that remains correct under collision-heavy data. The scenario, data, constraints, and failure modes differ from the workshop. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of a hash-table model and workload benchmark with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Relate hash stability, equality, and immutable key requirements.
Trace separate chaining and open addressing through collision and deletion cases.
Explain how load factor and resizing influence expected cost and memory.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
